title: Uday Varmora - Platform Engineer (DevOps) Resume
summary: DevOps Engineer with **1+ year** administering **Linux (RHEL) servers** and automating operations for cloud-native, containerised services — sustaining **99.9% uptime**, cutting release cycles **82% (45 → 8 min)** and operational toil **70%** across 20+ services. Hands-on with **Ansible, Jenkins, Terraform, Docker/Kubernetes, Python/Bash** and observability (**Prometheus, Grafana, ELK, Datadog**); drives incident response, proactive monitoring and on-call readiness.
skills: Python, Bash/Shell, Linux (RHEL, Ubuntu, Amazon Linux), System Administration
Ansible, Terraform, AWS CloudFormation, AWS SAM, Configuration Management
Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, GitHub Actions, AWS CodePipeline, AWS CodeBuild, ArgoCD
Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, ELK Stack, Datadog, CloudWatch
Docker, Kubernetes (EKS, OpenShift), Helm, Istio, Karpenter, KEDA, Ingress-NGINX
AWS — EC2, EKS, Lambda, S3, ECR, RDS, VPC, CloudWatch; Azure (Fundamentals)
HashiCorp Vault, AWS Secrets Manager, IAM, KMS, TLS/SSL, Trivy Operator
Incident & Change Management, Post-Incident Reviews, Runbooks, Agile, Git

bullets: Drove **root-cause analysis, performance tuning and troubleshooting** for **Linux (RHEL) production incidents** across CPU, memory, network and container runtime; built proactive monitoring with **Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, ELK Stack and Datadog** and authored runbooks and post-incident reviews supporting **on-call** response.

Automated multi-environment server provisioning and configuration on **Linux (RHEL, Ubuntu, Amazon Linux)** using **Ansible playbooks and Terraform IaC** (34 reusable modules, S3 remote state, DynamoDB locking) — cutting provisioning time **80%** and configuration drift **95%** across Dev, Staging and Production.

Designed and maintained **40+ CI/CD pipelines** led by **Jenkins** (with GitLab CI/CD, GitHub Actions and AWS CodePipeline) — automating end-to-end build, test and deployment across **20+ Dockerised microservices**, cutting release cycles **82% (45 min → under 8 min)** with zero manual intervention.

Developed **Python and Bash** automation to eliminate **~70% of recurring operational toil** — covering server operations, log triage, secret rotation and deployment workflows; improved documented operational procedures and reduced manual intervention.

Operated **Kubernetes (EKS, OpenShift)** clusters and Linux server fleets with **ArgoCD GitOps, Helm and Ingress-NGINX** — managing zero-downtime rollouts, autoscaling and high availability; sustained **99.9% uptime** across multi-AZ environments.

Built and maintained AWS infrastructure monitoring on **Linux-based environments**, configured CloudWatch dashboards, and triaged production incidents across Kubernetes workloads; authored operational runbooks for recurring issue patterns and root-cause analyses.

Wrote **Python and Bash** automation scripts to streamline deployment workflows and reduce manual operational steps — demonstrated ownership and impact, earning **full-time promotion within 5 months**.

projects.title: Cloud-Native SaaS CRM Platform — Multi-Tenant AWS / EKS Build & Deploy Infrastructure
projects.tech: Terraform · Ansible · AWS EKS · Docker · Jenkins · GitLab CI/CD · ArgoCD · Ingress-NGINX · Prometheus · Grafana
bullets: Designed multi-environment build/deploy architecture with per-environment **VPC isolation and S3/DynamoDB remote state** on Linux-based EKS nodes; executed zero-downtime **EKS cluster upgrade (v1.33 → v1.34)** managing node group rollouts, add-on compatibility and API deprecation remediation.

Built multi-region **disaster recovery strategy** using Velero (EBS snapshot Data Mover), S3/ECR cross-region replication and AWS Backup with cross-region vaults — achieving **RPO < 1 hour** for production workloads.

projects.title: Healthcare Management System — Cloud Infrastructure & CI/CD
projects.tech: AWS S3 · CloudFront · App Runner · ECR · Docker · GitHub Actions · Secrets Manager · IAM
bullets: Automated the full release workflow via **GitHub Actions** — Docker build, ECR/GHCR dual-push, S3 sync, CloudFront invalidation and App Runner deploy; applied least-privilege IAM scoping that removed 5+ overly permissive roles while serving 500+ concurrent users.

projects.title: Serverless Backend — Multi-Tenant Salon Management SaaS
projects.tech: AWS Lambda · SAM · CloudFormation · API Gateway · RDS PostgreSQL · Amazon EFS · Secrets Manager · Python
bullets: Architected a serverless build/deploy system using **6 nested SAM/CloudFormation templates** — enabling independent deployment of **30+ Python Lambda functions** with reproducible packaging and per-function least-privilege IAM.
